title: Data loss in locked_write on jq failure
description: Pipe hides jq exit code, empty tmp replaces real file

title: jq filter injection in cmd_update
description: User titles with quotes break jq via string interpolation
resolution: Rewrote locked_update with --arg for all values

title: jq filter injection in cmd_list and cmd_search
description: Status/type filters interpolated into jq without --arg
resolution: Switched to --arg for all filter values

title: install.sh dep check requires bn before installed
description: Circular dependency: bn checked in deps but symlinked later
resolution: Removed bn from dep check list

title: bn list --limit not supported
description: harness-doctor references --limit flag that bn does not have

title: Unsupported flags in 5 command files
description: --limit, --label, --since flags used in ama, dev-update, work-fix, work-archive, handoff
resolution: Removed all unsupported flags from command files

title: Uninstall does not remove bn symlink
description: install/update create symlink but uninstall leaves dangling link

title: grep -i treats search keyword as regex
description: Searching for [API] matches character class, not literal
resolution: Changed to grep -iF for fixed-string matching

title: tac and flock not POSIX portable
description: Linux-only utilities used in script claiming POSIX sh
resolution: Updated header to document Linux requirement

title: cmd_close prints success on failure
description: Success message could print before subshell exit propagates

title: migrate-to-beans.md missing field renames
description: Missing beads_issue_id and findings.jsonl rename guidance
